rationale.R1.6: The delegation to clean up the draft most directly requests sentence- and paragraph-level improvements in grammar, flow, register, and concision.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection must preserve uncertainty about the underspecified scope of the cleanup request.
rationale.RX.2: The artifact contains strong causal and scaling-law claims, so avoiding overclaiming is an active cross-cutting responsibility.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within projection rather than actually rewriting or evaluating the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: Because the text references clinical and policy domains, downstream harm from overstated causal reliability must be considered.
rationale.RX.5: The projection must remain traceable to the delegation wording and the provided artifact.
